data.title: Write structural and content validation test for prior-art search prompt fragment
data.description:
Create structural/content validation test for prior-art search prompt fragment. RED test - all tests fail because prompt fragment does not exist yet.

File: tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-structure.sh

Add .test-index RED marker: plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/prior-art-search.md: tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-structure.sh [test_fragment_file_exists]

Section extraction helper for within-section greps:
extract_section() { local file=$1 header=$2; awk -v h="$header" '$0 ~ h {found=1; next} found && /^##/{exit} found{print}' "$file"; }

Test assertions (9 tests):
1. test_fragment_file_exists: file exists and non-empty (MUST be first test function)
2. test_bright_line_triggers_section: contains Bright-Line Triggers with checklist items
3. test_trust_validation_gate: contains Trust Validation Gate header
4. test_trust_gate_hard_blocker_rule: section content has hard blocker AND decision verb
5. test_tiered_search_protocol: section has call budgets ~6 and ~10
6. test_routine_exclusions_content: section has single-file AND formatting/lint
7. test_evd_relationship: EVD section >= 5 lines AND supersede/boundary/complement
8. test_non_interactive_fallback: section has structured output indicator
9. test_is_executable: test file is executable

File Impact:
- tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-structure.sh (create)
- .test-index (edit - add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test gate exits 0 with RED-marked failures tolerated - Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] RED state confirmed - Verify: ! bash tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-structure.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and executable - Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-structure.sh
- [ ] At least 9 test functions - Verify: grep -c '^test_' tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-structure.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 9)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present - Verify: grep -q 'prior-art-search.md.*\[test_fragment_file_exists\]' .test-index
